sourcesContent:
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { Sparkles, Wallet, ChartPie } from "lucide-react"; import PlannerShell from "../components/PlannerShell"; import ProgressBar from "../components/ProgressBar"; import { StepLayout } from "../components/ui/StepLayout"; import { StepHero } from "../components/ui/StepHero"; import { StatCard } from "../components/ui/StatCard"; import { STEP_IMAGES } from "../components/ui/stepImages"; const Plan = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return ( navigate("/travel")}>← Edit} mobileHeaderRight={Share} >

Your Manali trip plan

Kolkata → Manali · 5 days · AI-generated

AI-generated plan
₹11,250
Total cost
75%
Budget used
₹3,750
Savings left
₹11,250 )} /> 75% )} />
Budget used ₹11,250 / ₹15,000
₹3,750 remaining 75% of ₹15,000
Day 1 · Departure Kolkata → Delhi → Manali
✈️
IndiGo 6E-234 · 7:30 AM
Kolkata → Delhi · 2h 40m · ₹3,200
🚌
HRTC Volvo · 6:00 PM
Delhi → Manali · Overnight bus · ₹900
Day 2 · Arrival & rest Manali old town
🏨
Hotel Snowflake (check-in 12 PM)
Mall Road · ₹700/night × 4 = ₹2,800
🍜
Food (Budget)
Local dhabas, café row · ~₹400
Day 3–4 · Sightseeing Solang · Rohtang · Hadimba
🗺️
Solang Valley + Rohtang Pass
Walking + auto · ~₹200/day · Entry ₹500
🏛️
Hadimba Temple + Manu Temple
15 min walk from hotel · Free entry
); }; export default Plan;
